author: anon-13168fa2
content: Created 00-foundations/06-the-guild.md explaining the current state of the guild honestly: infrastructure is being built, here is how you participate today using AI adversarial review, public GitHub portfolio, and informal mentors. Added forward-link from 00-foundations/01-the-new-literacy.md so novices hit the explanation early in Phase 0. Added chapter to README.md Phase 0 index. Later-chapter references to 'the guild channel' still read naturally now that there is a canonical definition the reader has been pointed to.
